name: Monkey Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the hot milk in a bowl.
2. Add the sugar, salt, and butter to the milk.
3. Dissolve the yeast in the warm water in another bowl.
4. Stir in the dissolved yeast mixture into the milk mixture.
5. Stir in enough flour to make an easily handled dough.
6. Knead until smooth and shiny (5 minutes or longer).
7. Form into a long, narrow loaf.
8. Cover with a damp cloth and let rise until doubled in bulk.
9. Cut the loaf into 2-inch pieces.
10. Dip the pieces into the melted butter.
11. Arrange in layers in a greased 9-inch tube pan.
12. Let rise again until doubled.
13. Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit (175 degrees Celsius).
14. Bake for 50 minutes, or until golden brown and crispy.
15. Turn out of the mold to cool before serving, or serve hot from the oven.
